system.description:
Available once you have taken the Shadow of the Uncanny "Scarred by Trackless Wastes."

When you reach out to the Uncanny forces that Shadow our mundane world, describe how the ritual works. Choose an attribute and roll +that attribute. The Director may say the ritual requires weird materials; will take 1 minute, 10 minutes, or 1 hour; requires chanting and gestures; requires arcane symbols; needs one or two helpers; or needs a tome of magic.

Spend Hold (by the attribute you rolled):

  • +Nerve: Banish a spirit or curse; bar a place or portal to a person or creature type; trap a person within an area.
  • +Brains: Observe another place or time; absorb the knowledge of a place, person, or item; remove any Condition from a Hero (even their highest).
  • +Charm: Bargain with a spirit for secrets (ask 2 Investigate! questions); communicate across a language barrier; add +1 Rating (max +2) to a Contact.
  • +Tough: Inflict 2 Harm at a distance with no obvious source; enchant a weapon (add or remove a Tag); do one thing beyond human physical limitations.

failure.value: Something goes horribly wrong — take a Condition and the Director describes the nature of the larger calamity.
